title: Bare Bone X Better Leaves
description: Bored Of Worst Leaves Of Bare Bones Try This !!
body:
# 🍃FEATURES :-

**If You Are like Bare Bones Texture Pack But Not Its Leaves Then Try This Pack!!**
-  Replaces the Bare Bone's leaves with Vanilla leaves !!
-  Not Need To Use Bare Bone With This Pack !!

# 💦USAGE:-
- In Your Texture Pack Folder Apply Only This Pack.
- If You Use Bare Bone With This ,Then It Not Works.
- Keep In Mind !!

# 💳CREDIT :-
- **Expect Leaves All Credits Are Goes To [Bare Bone's](https://modrinth.com/project/rox3U8B6) Makers !!**
- **Leaves Credit Goes To [JustChiLLPlays](https://youtube.com/@justchillplays?si=KuKRGWkbIFLBMP7i) !!**

# 🧨SUPPORT :-
- **[YOUTUBE](https://youtube.com/@justchillplays?si=KuKRGWkbIFLBMP7i) !!**
- [DISCORD](https://discord.gg/nKmJ5YsT7B) !!
